relationships.name: signs
relationships.description: An Account executes one or more Contracts.

sources.snippet: | `account_id` | UUID | **FK → Account** |

relationships.name: references
relationships.description: Many Contracts reference one Plan via plan_code.

sources.snippet: | `plan_code` | string | **FK → Plan** |

relationships.name: holds
relationships.description: An Account holds subscriptions; at most one active per product line per R-14.

sources.snippet: An Account may not hold more than one active Subscription per product line at any time.

relationships.name: generates
relationships.description: An executed Contract generates an active Subscription.

sources.snippet: **Create Subscription** — consumes the executed `Contract` and `Plan`; produces an active `Subscription`

relationships.name: defines

sources.snippet: | `feature_keys` | array<string> | maps to Entitlement grants |

relationships.description: A Subscription accrues many UsageRecord rows.

sources.snippet: produces timestamped `UsageRecord` rows keyed to the `Subscription`.

sources.snippet: | `subscription_id` | UUID | **FK → Subscription** |

relationships.name: tracked_by

sources.snippet: | `subscription_id` | UUID | **FK → Subscription** |

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 权益须与当前套餐一致
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 账户的活动权益必须始终与其当前订阅套餐所定义的权益集合一致。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Keeps the granted entitlement set consistent with the Plan and caps seat grants.
rules.title: Entitlements must match current Plan
rules.titleZh: 权益须与当前套餐一致

statement.en: An Account's active Entitlements must at all times match the entitlement set defined by its current Subscription Plan.
statement.zh: 账户的活动权益必须始终与其当前订阅套餐所定义的权益集合一致。

rules.formal: forall e in Account.activeEntitlements: e in Plan(Subscription.plan_code).feature_keys AND forall f in Plan.feature_keys: exists e in Entitlement where e.feature_key = f AND e.state = 'granted'

sources.snippet: An Account's active Entitlements must at all times match the entitlement set defined by its current Subscription Plan.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 仅在初始发票后开通
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 在初始发票开具之前，订阅的权益不得开通，除非合同带有 net_terms 标志。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Controls when entitlements may be provisioned relative to invoicing, with net-terms exception.
rules.title: Provision only after initial Invoice
rules.titleZh: 仅在初始发票后开通

statement.en: A Subscription's Entitlements shall not be provisioned before the initial Invoice is issued, unless the Contract carries a net_terms flag.
statement.zh: 在初始发票开具之前，订阅的权益不得开通，除非合同带有 net_terms 标志。

rules.formal: Entitlement.provisioned -> (Invoice.issued = true OR Account.net_terms = true)

sources.snippet: A Subscription's Entitlements shall not be provisioned before the initial Invoice is issued, unless the Contract carries a `net_terms` flag.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 超量计入下一张发票
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 超出套餐包含配额的用量必须在下一张发票上作为超量行项计费。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Governs metering, overage calculation, invoice validity, and revenue recognition.
rules.title: Bill overage on next Invoice
rules.titleZh: 超量计入下一张发票

statement.en: Usage beyond a Plan's included quota must be billed as an overage line item on the next Invoice.
statement.zh: 超出套餐包含配额的用量必须在下一张发票上作为超量行项计费。

rules.formal: sum(UsageRecord.quantity) > Plan.included_quota -> Invoice.line_items contains overage_item

sources.snippet: Usage beyond a Plan's included quota must be billed as an overage line item on the next Invoice.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 降级不在周期结束前撤销
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 套餐降级在当前计费周期结束前不得撤销已移除的功能。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Keeps the granted entitlement set consistent with the Plan and caps seat grants.
rules.title: Downgrade never revokes before period end
rules.titleZh: 降级不在周期结束前撤销

statement.en: A Plan downgrade may not revoke the removed features before the end of the current billing period.
statement.zh: 套餐降级在当前计费周期结束前不得撤销已移除的功能。

rules.formal: PlanDowngraded -> Entitlement.state = 'scheduled_revoke' AND Entitlement.effective_at >= Subscription.current_period_end

sources.snippet: A Plan downgrade may not revoke the removed features before the end of the current billing period.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 权益漂移须一个工作日内修复，超72小时升级
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 检测到的权益漂移须在一个工作日内修复，超过72小时未解决的漂移必须升级至 RevOps 负责人。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Keeps the granted entitlement set consistent with the Plan and caps seat grants.
rules.title: Remediate drift within one business day; escalate at 72h
rules.titleZh: 权益漂移须一个工作日内修复，超72小时升级

statement.en: Detected entitlement drift is required to be remediated within one business day, and drift unresolved beyond 72 hours must be escalated to the RevOps lead.
statement.zh: 检测到的权益漂移须在一个工作日内修复，超过72小时未解决的漂移必须升级至 RevOps 负责人。

rules.formal: EntitlementDriftDetected -> remediate within 1 business day; if unresolved > 72h then escalate(RevOps_lead)

sources.snippet: Detected entitlement drift is required to be remediated within one business day, and drift unresolved beyond 72 hours must be escalated to the RevOps lead.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 无限层级不产生超量费用
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 无限层级合同下的订阅无论记录用量如何均不产生超量费用。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Governs metering, overage calculation, invoice validity, and revenue recognition.
rules.title: Unlimited tier incurs no overage
rules.titleZh: 无限层级不产生超量费用

statement.en: A Subscription on an unlimited-tier Contract shall not incur overage charges regardless of recorded usage.
statement.zh: 无限层级合同下的订阅无论记录用量如何均不产生超量费用。

rules.formal: Contract.tier = 'unlimited' -> Invoice.overage_amount = 0

sources.snippet: A Subscription on an unlimited-tier Contract shall not incur overage charges regardless of recorded usage.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 折扣审批阈值（20% Deal Desk，40% 销售副总）
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 折扣超过标价20%的报价须经 Deal Desk 批准，超过40%的折扣须在合同签署前获得销售副总批准。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Gates that must pass before a Contract may be signed (discount thresholds, minimum term).
rules.title: Discount approval thresholds (20% Deal Desk, 40% VP)
rules.titleZh: 折扣审批阈值（20% Deal Desk，40% 销售副总）

statement.en: A quote whose discount exceeds 20% of list price must be approved by the Deal Desk, and a discount exceeding 40% is required to receive VP of Sales approval before the Contract may be signed.
statement.zh: 折扣超过标价20%的报价须经 Deal Desk 批准，超过40%的折扣须在合同签署前获得销售副总批准。

rules.formal: Contract.discount_pct > 20 -> DealDesk.approved = true; Contract.discount_pct > 40 -> VPSales.approved = true

trigger.description: Before Contract signature, during quote validation

sources.snippet: A quote whose discount exceeds 20% of list price must be approved by the Deal Desk, and a discount exceeding 40% is required to receive VP of Sales approval before the Contract may be signed.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 续约商机最迟提前90天开立
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 续约商机必须在订阅合同期满日前不晚于90天开立。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Timing and provisioning of renewals, upgrades, and trial conversion.
rules.title: Open renewal no later than T-90
rules.titleZh: 续约商机最迟提前90天开立

statement.en: A RenewalOpportunity must be opened no later than 90 days before the Subscription term-end date.
statement.zh: 续约商机必须在订阅合同期满日前不晚于90天开立。

rules.formal: RenewalOpportunity.opened_at <= Contract.term_end - 90 days

sources.snippet: A RenewalOpportunity must be opened no later than 90 days before the Subscription term-end date.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 未续约订阅进入14天宽限期
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 未在合同期满日前续约的订阅应进入14天宽限期，期间权益保持有效。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Grace, dunning, suspension, reinstatement, and churn state transitions.
rules.title: Unrenewed subscription enters 14-day grace
rules.titleZh: 未续约订阅进入14天宽限期

statement.en: A Subscription not renewed by its term-end date shall move to a 14-day grace period during which Entitlements remain active.
statement.zh: 未在合同期满日前续约的订阅应进入14天宽限期，期间权益保持有效。

rules.formal: now > Contract.term_end AND NOT renewed -> Subscription.status = 'grace' for 14 days AND Entitlement.state = 'granted'

sources.snippet: A Subscription not renewed by its term-end date shall move to a 14-day grace period during which Entitlements remain active.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 宽限期满后暂停并撤销
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 14天宽限期满仍未续约的订阅必须被暂停，并撤销其所有权益。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Grace, dunning, suspension, reinstatement, and churn state transitions.
rules.title: Suspend and revoke on grace expiry
rules.titleZh: 宽限期满后暂停并撤销

statement.en: A Subscription whose 14-day grace period expires without renewal must be suspended and all of its Entitlements revoked.
statement.zh: 14天宽限期满仍未续约的订阅必须被暂停，并撤销其所有权益。

rules.formal: Subscription.status = 'grace' AND grace_age >= 14 days AND NOT renewed -> Subscription.status = 'suspended' AND forall Entitlement.state = 'revoked'

sources.snippet: A Subscription whose 14-day grace period expires without renewal must be suspended and all of its Entitlements revoked.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 催款：10天内最多3次重试
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 付款失败应触发催款流程，自动重试不超过3次，分布于10个日历日内。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Grace, dunning, suspension, reinstatement, and churn state transitions.
rules.title: Dunning: max 3 retries over 10 days
rules.titleZh: 催款：10天内最多3次重试

statement.en: A failed Payment shall trigger a dunning sequence of no more than 3 automated retry attempts spread over 10 calendar days.
statement.zh: 付款失败应触发催款流程，自动重试不超过3次，分布于10个日历日内。

rules.formal: Payment.status = 'failed' -> dunning(retries <= 3, window = 10 days)

sources.snippet: A failed Payment shall trigger a dunning sequence of no more than 3 automated retry attempts spread over 10 calendar days.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 仅在补缴后恢复，并在1小时内重新授予
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 被暂停的订阅仅在成功补缴付款结清所有逾期发票后方可恢复，此后权益须在1小时内重新授予。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Grace, dunning, suspension, reinstatement, and churn state transitions.
rules.title: Reinstate only after catch-up payment; re-grant within 1h
rules.titleZh: 仅在补缴后恢复，并在1小时内重新授予

statement.en: A suspended Subscription may be reinstated only after a successful catch-up Payment clears all overdue Invoices, after which Entitlements must be re-granted within 1 hour.
statement.zh: 被暂停的订阅仅在成功补缴付款结清所有逾期发票后方可恢复，此后权益须在1小时内重新授予。

rules.formal: Subscription.status = 'suspended' AND Payment.status = 'succeeded' AND all overdue Invoices cleared -> Subscription.status = 'active' AND Entitlement.state = 'granted' within 1h

trigger.description: On successful catch-up payment for a suspended subscription

sources.snippet: A suspended Subscription may be reinstated only after a successful catch-up Payment clears all overdue Invoices, after which Entitlements must be re-granted within 1 hour.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 暂停超30天后取消
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 连续暂停超过30天的订阅必须被取消，其续约商机关闭为已流失。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Grace, dunning, suspension, reinstatement, and churn state transitions.
rules.title: Cancel after 30 days suspended
rules.titleZh: 暂停超30天后取消

statement.en: A Subscription that remains suspended for more than 30 consecutive days must be cancelled and its RenewalOpportunity closed as lost.
statement.zh: 连续暂停超过30天的订阅必须被取消，其续约商机关闭为已流失。

rules.formal: Subscription.status = 'suspended' AND suspended_days > 30 -> Subscription.status = 'cancelled' AND RenewalOpportunity.stage = 'lost'

sources.snippet: A Subscription that remains suspended for more than 30 consecutive days must be cancelled and its RenewalOpportunity closed as lost.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 每条产品线仅一个活动订阅
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 任何时候账户每条产品线不得持有超过一个活动订阅。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Uniqueness constraints enforced at subscription creation.
rules.title: One active subscription per product line
rules.titleZh: 每条产品线仅一个活动订阅

statement.en: An Account may not hold more than one active Subscription per product line at any time.
statement.zh: 任何时候账户每条产品线不得持有超过一个活动订阅。

rules.formal: count(Subscription where account_id = A AND status = 'active' AND product_line = L) <= 1

sources.snippet: An Account may not hold more than one active Subscription per product line at any time.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 发票须引用订阅且至少含一个行项
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 每张发票必须引用生成它的订阅，且无至少一个行项不得开具。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Governs metering, overage calculation, invoice validity, and revenue recognition.
rules.title: Invoice must reference a Subscription and have a line item
rules.titleZh: 发票须引用订阅且至少含一个行项

statement.en: Every Invoice must reference the Subscription that generated it and shall not be issued without at least one line item.
statement.zh: 每张发票必须引用生成它的订阅，且无至少一个行项不得开具。

rules.formal: Invoice.subscription_id != null AND len(Invoice.line_items) >= 1

sources.snippet: Every Invoice must reference the Subscription that generated it and shall not be issued without at least one line item.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 期中升级立即开通并按比例计费
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 期中升级须立即开通，差价应在下一张发票上按比例分摊。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Timing and provisioning of renewals, upgrades, and trial conversion.
rules.title: Mid-term upgrade provisioned immediately, prorated
rules.titleZh: 期中升级立即开通并按比例计费

statement.en: A mid-term upgrade is required to be provisioned immediately and the price difference shall be prorated on the next Invoice.
statement.zh: 期中升级须立即开通，差价应在下一张发票上按比例分摊。

rules.formal: PlanUpgraded(mid_term) -> Entitlement.granted immediately AND Invoice.line_items contains prorated_diff

sources.snippet: A mid-term upgrade is required to be provisioned immediately and the price difference shall be prorated on the next Invoice.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 席位授予不得超过已购席位数
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 基于席位的权益授予的活动席位数不得超过合同购买的席位数。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Keeps the granted entitlement set consistent with the Plan and caps seat grants.
rules.title: Seat grant cannot exceed purchased seats
rules.titleZh: 席位授予不得超过已购席位数

statement.en: A seat-based Entitlement may not grant more active seats than the seat count purchased on the Contract.
statement.zh: 基于席位的权益授予的活动席位数不得超过合同购买的席位数。

rules.formal: Entitlement.seat_grant <= Contract.seat_count

sources.snippet: A seat-based Entitlement may not grant more active seats than the seat count purchased on the Contract.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 最短12个月合同期，除非财务批准例外
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 合同期限最短为12个月，除非财务批准按月例外。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Gates that must pass before a Contract may be signed (discount thresholds, minimum term).
rules.title: Minimum 12-month term unless Finance exception
rules.titleZh: 最短12个月合同期，除非财务批准例外

statement.en: A Contract term shall be a minimum of 12 months unless a month-to-month exception is approved by Finance.
statement.zh: 合同期限最短为12个月，除非财务批准按月例外。

rules.formal: Contract.term_months >= 12 OR Finance.month_to_month_approved = true

sources.snippet: A Contract term shall be a minimum of 12 months unless a month-to-month exception is approved by Finance.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 付款成功前不得确认收入
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 在相应发票付款成功之前，不得对订阅确认收入。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Governs metering, overage calculation, invoice validity, and revenue recognition.
rules.title: No revenue recognition before payment succeeds
rules.titleZh: 付款成功前不得确认收入

statement.en: Revenue may not be recognized against a Subscription until the corresponding Invoice Payment has succeeded.
statement.zh: 在相应发票付款成功之前，不得对订阅确认收入。

rules.formal: RevenueRecognized(Subscription) -> Payment.status = 'succeeded'

sources.snippet: Revenue may not be recognized against a Subscription until the corresponding Invoice Payment has succeeded.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: 免费试用自动转换或暂停，最长30天
rules.standardizedLogicRule: 免费试用订阅须在试用期结束时自动转为付费套餐或被暂停，且未经 CSM 批准不得超过30天。
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Timing and provisioning of renewals, upgrades, and trial conversion.
rules.title: Free trial auto-converts or suspends; max 30 days
rules.titleZh: 免费试用自动转换或暂停，最长30天

statement.en: A free-trial Subscription must auto-convert to a paid Plan at trial end or be suspended, and may not extend beyond 30 days without CSM approval.
statement.zh: 免费试用订阅须在试用期结束时自动转为付费套餐或被暂停，且未经 CSM 批准不得超过30天。

sources.snippet: A free-trial Subscription must auto-convert to a paid Plan at trial end or be suspended, and may not extend beyond 30 days without CSM approval.

ruleGroups.rationale: Gates that must pass before a Contract may be signed (discount thresholds, minimum term).
Uniqueness constraints enforced at subscription creation.
Controls when entitlements may be provisioned relative to invoicing, with net-terms exception.
Keeps the granted entitlement set consistent with the Plan and caps seat grants.
Governs metering, overage calculation, invoice validity, and revenue recognition.
Timing and provisioning of renewals, upgrades, and trial conversion.
Grace, dunning, suspension, reinstatement, and churn state transitions.

actions.name: createOrderForm
actions.description: 消费赢单商机与所选套餐，生成与账户关联的订单表草稿。

actions.name: validateQuote
actions.description: 消费订单表草稿、标价与折扣，生成已批准或被拒绝的报价；超阈值折扣需升级审批。

actions.name: signContract
actions.description: 消费已批准的订单表，生成含起止日期与承诺数量的已签署合同。

actions.name: createSubscription
actions.description: 消费已签署合同与套餐，生成活动订阅与首张发票（初始合同期收费）。

actions.name: provisionEntitlements
actions.description: 消费订阅的套餐映射，生成权益记录（功能开关、配额、席位），并关闭开通任务。

actions.name: reconcileEntitlements
actions.description: 消费现有权益集合与套餐规格，生成漂移报告；若不匹配则生成修复开通任务。

sources.snippet: **P1 — Quote to Provision / 报价到开通**: from an approved Opportunity through a signed Order Form to a live, fully entitled Subscription.

actions.name: recordUsage
actions.description: 消费计量的产品事件（API调用、席位、GB），生成与订阅关联的带时间戳用量记录。

actions.name: calculateOverage
actions.description: 消费累计用量总额与权益包含配额，当用量超过配额时生成超量数量。

actions.name: issueInvoice
actions.description: 消费经常性套餐收费及任何超量行项，生成周期发票。

actions.name: collectPayment
actions.description: 对未结发票发起付款工具扣款，生成付款并将发票标记为已付或失败。

actions.name: recognizeRevenue
actions.description: 消费订阅合同期与发票，生成已确认收入计划。

sources.snippet: **P2 — Usage to Invoice / 用量到开票**: continuous metering of consumption against included quota, overage calculation, and invoicing.

actions.name: openRenewal
actions.description: 消费临近期满的订阅，在期满前90天生成续约商机。

actions.name: processRenewal
actions.description: 消费客户的续约决定，生成续约、升级或降级后的订阅。

actions.name: adjustEntitlements
actions.description: 消费新套餐映射，升级时立即授予新权益，降级时安排在周期结束撤销已移除功能。

actions.name: enterGracePeriod
actions.description: 消费未在期满日续约的订阅，生成14天宽限状态。

sources.snippet: **P3 — Renewal to Expansion / 续约到扩展**: term-end renewal, upgrade/downgrade, and grace/suspension handling.

actions.name: runDunning
actions.description: 消费付款失败的发票，生成最多3次、分布于10天的催款重试计划。

actions.name: suspendSubscription
actions.description: 消费宽限期或催款耗尽的订阅，生成已暂停订阅并撤销所有权益访问。

actions.name: reinstateSubscription
actions.description: 消费已暂停订阅的成功补缴付款，生成重新激活的订阅并重新授予权益访问。

actions.name: churnSubscription
actions.description: 消费暂停超过30天的订阅，生成已取消订阅与关闭为流失的续约商机。

triggers.description: Grace-period start can lead to suspension.

sources.snippet: **P4 — Suspension to Recovery / 暂停到恢复**: dunning, suspension, reinstatement, and churn on terminal non-payment.
